  "experiment_overview": "The experiment aims to quantify Sonic Hedgehog (Shh) signaling using a quantitative PCR-based assay in a cellular model of ciliogenesis. The goal is to measure the relative expression levels of specific genes involved in Shh signaling.",
  "procedures_observed": [
    "A scientist in a lab coat and gloves places a test tube into an incubator set at 37°C.",

    "The scientist uses a centrifuge to spin down the contents of a tube.",
    "The scientist places a tube into a thermal cycler for amplification.",
    "The scientist analyzes the data from the thermal cycler using software."
  ],

    "Test tubes, centrifuge tubes, wash buffer, thermal cycler, software for data analysis"
  ],
  "tools_and_setup": [
    "Incubator, centrifuge, thermal cycler, computer with data analysis software"
  ],
  "quantitative_observations": [
    "Temperature settings: 37°C for incubation, 95°C for initial denaturation, 60°C for annealing, 72°C for extension",
    "Volumes of solutions added during the experiment",
    "Data points from the thermal cycler analysis displayed on a graph"
  ],
  "key_transitions": [
    "From placing a tube into the incubator to adding a wash buffer",
    "From spinning down the tube to placing it in the thermal cycler",
    "From analyzing the thermal cycler data to displaying the results on a graph"
  ],
